name: Crawler
description: Legless and low, easy to finish once you have seen it — but it grabs for the ankle as you pass, and a bad grip leaves you limping.
notes: T46 · mirrors the engine ENEMIES table (combat.ts). Low hp (2) — a soft target in a straight fight. graspWound wound.sprain: slipping past it carries a higher catch chance and an ankle sprain rather than a random blow. Keyed to zombie.crawler (lowProfile).
